description: A dark-toned bust portrait of a middle-aged man with slicked-back dark hair and a clean-shaven face. He wears a black suit jacket, white shirt, and dark cravat. His gaze is directed slightly to the left with a serious, contemplative expression. The background is uniformly dark brown to black, and the artist's signature appears at lower left. The rendering emphasizes the contrast between the illuminated face and the surrounding darkness.
